basicDetails.schemeName: Scheme for assistance for Start Ups/ Innovation: Interest Subsidy

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md:
The &amp;quot;Scheme for Assistance for Start Ups/ Innovation&amp;quot; is an umbrella scheme launched by the Industries and Mines Department, Gujarat under the  Gujarat Industrial Policy. Effective from August 7th, 2020 to August 6th, 2025, it aims to drive economic growth by generating jobs, fostering competition, and introducing next-gen solutions.
The component &amp;quot;Interest Subsidy&amp;quot; provides financial support to startups with innovative ideas across various sectors. Startups approved under this scheme are eligible for an additional interest subsidy of 1%, up to a maximum of 9%, on term loans for MSME assistance.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - **Financial Support:** Interest subsidy of 1%, maximum up to 9% on term loans under the provisions of scheme for assistance to MSMEs.
schemeContent.exclusions_md:
- Entities formed by splitting or restructuring an existing business are not considered startups under this scheme.
  - Startups availing benefits under other startup schemes of the Government of Gujarat are ineligible.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The "Scheme for Assistance for Start Ups/ Innovation" under the Gujarat Industrial Policy, aims to drive economic growth by generating jobs, fostering competition, and introducing next-gen solutions.

children.text: The "Scheme for Assistance for Start Ups/ Innovation" is an umbrella scheme launched by the Industries and Mines Department, Gujarat under the  Gujarat Industrial Policy. Effective from August 7th, 2020 to August 6th, 2025, it aims to drive economic growth by generating jobs, fostering competition, and introducing next-gen solutions.

The component "Interest Subsidy" provides financial support to startups with innovative ideas across various sectors. Startups approved under this scheme are eligible for an additional interest subsidy of 1%, up to a maximum of 9%, on term loans for MSME assistance.
Financial Support:
Interest subsidy of 1%, maximum up to 9% on term loans under the provisions of scheme for assistance to MSMEs.
Entities formed by splitting or restructuring an existing business are not considered startups under this scheme.
Startups availing benefits under other startup schemes of the Government of Gujarat are ineligible.
Registration Process:
Step 1:
Visit the
online portal
and click on the "Register" button, located at the top right corner.
Step 2:
Enter Email ID and click on Next button. Verify the details and click on "Submit" to get registered on portal.
Step 3:
Upon login, fill in the details on Common Application Form. Click on "Sign Up".
Application Process:
Step 1:
Visit the
online portal and c
lick on Login button. Enter Registered Email ID and Password and click on the "Sign In" button
Step 2:
In "Dashboard" section fill in all the required details.
Step 3:
Click on Apply Now Icon located at Dashboard of User.
Step 4:
From the list Select the Scheme and Fill the Application details.

applicationProcess.process_md:
> **Registration Process:**

**Step 1:** Visit the [online portal](https://startup.gujarat.gov.in/home) and click on the &quot;Register&quot; button, located at the top right corner.
**Step 2:** Enter Email ID and click on Next button. Verify the details and click on &quot;Submit&quot; to get registered on portal.
**Step 3:** Upon login, fill in the details on Common Application Form. Click on &quot;Sign Up&quot;.
> **Application Process:**

**Step 1:** Visit the [online portal and c](https://startup.gujarat.gov.in/home)lick on Login button. Enter Registered Email ID and Password and click on the &quot;Sign In&quot; button
**Step 2:** In &quot;Dashboard&quot; section fill in all the required details. 
**Step 3:** Click on Apply Now Icon located at Dashboard of User.
**Step 4:** From the list Select the Scheme and Fill the Application details.
> **Contact Us:**

Startup Gujarat Cell
Office of Industries Commissionerate
Block No: 1, 3rd Floor, Udhyog Bhavan, Sector: 11, Gandhinagar - 382010 Gujarat, INDIA.
079-23252588 / 1800-233-0616
icstup@gujarat.gov.in

schemeDefinitions.name: Startups (For The Purpose Of This Scheme)

children.text: Any individual/group of individuals having innovative idea/concept after legal registration as LLP, Partnership or Private Limited Company. However, an entity shall cease to be a Startup on completion of ten years from the date of its incorporation/ registration or if its turnover for any previous year exceeds one hundred crore rupees.
“limited liability partnership” shall have the meaning as assigned to it in clause (n) of subsection (1) of Section 2 of the Limited Liability Partnership Act, 2008;
“partnership firm” means a firm registered under section 59 of the Partnership Act, 1932;
“private limited company” shall have the meaning as assigned to it in clause (66) Section 2 of the Companies Act, 2013;
‘turnover” shall have the meaning as assigned to it in clause (91) Section 2 of the Companies Act, 2013

“Entity” is working towards innovation, development or improvement of products or processes or services, or if it is a scalable business model with a high potential of employment generation or wealth creation.

schemeDefinitions.name: Innovative Project

children.text: An innovative project is a project that seeks to introduce new technology or make changes in the existing technology by implementing large and small, radical and incremental changes, resulting into the formulation of novel products, processes or services.

schemeDefinitions.definitions_md: An innovative project is a project that seeks to introduce new technology or make changes in the existing technology by implementing large and small, radical and incremental changes, resulting into the formulation of novel products, processes or services.

schemeDefinitions.name: Mentor

children.text: An individual/ resource person/expert who provides mentoring support to Startups through Nodal Institutes, possess domain/subject expertise and knowledge of Startup ecosystem of the state.

schemeDefinitions.definitions_md: An individual/ resource person/expert who provides mentoring support to Startups through Nodal Institutes, possess domain/subject expertise and knowledge of Startup ecosystem of the state.

schemeDefinitions.name: Nodal Institution

children.text: Nodal Institution means an Institution which is approved /sanctioned by SLEC and intend to nurture and develop startups through resources, mentorship, networking and other common services such as infrastructure, equipment and facilities available in the institution.

schemeDefinitions.definitions_md: Nodal Institution means an Institution which is approved /sanctioned by SLEC and intend to nurture and develop startups through resources, mentorship, networking and other common services such as infrastructure, equipment and facilities available in the institution.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
- Any individual or group of individuals with an innovative idea or concept, recommended by an approved Nodal Institution, is eligible.
  - The scheme is open to startups in any sector or branch of science, technology, engineering, agriculture, healthcare, etc., making it sector-agnostic.

> **Note:** Startups availing benefits under the Student Startup and Innovation Policy (SSIP) are also eligible.

children.text: Any individual or group of individuals with an innovative idea or concept, recommended by an approved Nodal Institution, is eligible.
The scheme is open to startups in any sector or branch of science, technology, engineering, agriculture, healthcare, etc., making it sector-agnostic.
Note:
Startups availing benefits under the Student Startup and Innovation Policy (SSIP) are also eligible.
